/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Pointes_of_No_Return.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Pointes_of_No_Return.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Pointes_of_No_Return.dir/src/Decor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Pointes_of_No_Return.dir/src/SideBuilding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Pointes_of_No_Return.dir/src/Road.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Pointes_of_No_Return.dir/src/Obstacle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Pointes_of_No_Return.dir/src/SaveManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Pointes_of_No_Return.dir/src/SceneManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Pointes_of_No_Return.dir/src/GameplayState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Pointes_of_No_Return.dir/src/MainMenuState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Pointes_of_No_Return.dir/src/LevelSelectState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Pointes_of_No_Return.dir/src/Menu1State.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Pointes_of_No_Return.dir/src/Menu2State.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Pointes_of_No_Return.dir/src/DressingState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Pointes_of_No_Return.dir/src/RulesState.cpp.o -o Pointes_of_No_Return   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -lsfml-graphics -lsfml-window -lsfml-system -lsfml-audio
